MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Tammy Phillips' Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause scheduled on 6/13/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Jury Trial Date of 9/10/2012 at 9:30 AM, in Department 610. Court to give notice. Proceedings not reported. (610)
